vllm.title: [Core] Align whisper closer to other multimodal models
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Prior to this change, the encoder inputs were passed into the model,
and the encoder would be executed on the first call to the model.
This made encoder-decoder models work differently from other
multimodal models.
With this change, we now execute the encoder separately, prior to
the normal model ca

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Optimize Gumbel Sampling Kernel
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The Gumbel sampling kernel currently uses only a single thread block per request. Because the vocab size is large, this forces a single block to handle a large-scale reduction, which is often slow.
This PR improves efficiency by introducing two-step reduction. The Triton kernel now computes only the
